use_cases: Decorative star field background for hero sections and landing pages
Space-themed or cosmos-inspired visual layer for themed pages
Ambient background decoration for empty states or loading screens
ai_summary: A minimalist SVG star pattern background component featuring multiple small star shapes and dot elements rendered at various positions. The component uses flat black fills with clip paths and no animations or interactions, making it a pure decorative visual element suitable for hero sections, themed pages, or ambient background layers in various UI contexts.
